name: dnsx
description: Resolve and validate a list of hostnames at scale with wildcard detection.
long_description: dnsx is a DNS resolution tool, not a subdomain discovery tool. It takes a list of hostnames (typically output from Subfinder or Amass) and resolves them to confirm which ones are live, filtering out wildcard DNS responses. Use dnsx as a post-processing step after subdomain discovery — pipe Subfinder or Amass output into dnsx to get a clean, validated list of active hosts.
